title: Create: Knapped
body:
This mod extends the flushwork blocks from Knapped to the Create stones! Add various decorative patterns to the new stones added by Create, increasing decorative possibilities!

Credit to [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for an easy-to-learn and easy-to-use mod-making system! :D
Join the Discord [here](https://discord.com/invite/ASkVBubyzH) for future updates on my mods!
For more information, visit the [wiki](https://anotherpedia.com/#Create:%20Knapped)!

**_This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Knapped](https://modrinth.com/mod/knapped)._**

Most cut and polished cut stones can be used to create flushworks, except for blocks that are too dark for flint flushworks.
![The flushworks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b08d02d7aac827cbcc16eb7b59c8f5388dd788e.png)
